title: [YTPMV] Sing Like The King
description:
I made the background music in FL Studio and the drawings using a handy DS homebrew application, DSNotes. Then I mounted everything with Vegas and added the King's beautiful voice.

Download MP3 (5,51 MB): http://www.mediafire.com/?mk2oi434cksp1x5
Alternative: http://www.mediafire.com/?mk2oi434cksp1x5

Lyrics:

[intro]
All true warriors strive for courage,
All true warriors strive for peace,
All true warriors strive for dinner.
Oh boy, I'm so hungry, I could eat...
Enough!

Boi, if you wanna be cool like me,
Boi, if you wanna be sexy like me,
Boi, if you wanna,
Boi, if you need to,
Learn how to sing like the King.

[OAH, OAH, OAH HA HA]

Boi, this Triforce is what all true warriors strive for!
Boi, this ship is what all true warriors need.
Boi, this Wii is what all true warriors wanna.
I just wonder what...
Link, hear me!

Boi, if you wanna be awesome like me,
Boi, if you wanna be... like me,
Boi, if you wanna,
Boi, if you need to,
Learn how to sing like the King.

[OAH, OAH, OAH HA HA]

Tomorrow I'll... [x7]
Scrub me away!

[OAH, OAH, OAH HA HA]
[ending]
